stemHtml:
Refer to Enroute_E(LO)2_03 chart from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Given:

TALLA (TLA) VOR/DME (55°30N, 003°21´W)
TURNBERRY (TRN) VOR/DME (55°19´N, 004°47´W)
Aircraft position: 35 NM from TLA and 40 NM from TRN

Find the geographical position of the aircraft if the DME indications are increasing while following a true track of 180°. (Disregard slant range corrections)
